description: Use this API to read a dynamics Snapshot File into PSSE working memory. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = rstr(sfile)

parameters.name: sfile
parameters.description: Snapshot file; ‘*’ to restore the most recently accessed snapshot file in the current execution of psse. (input; no default allowed).

error_codes.description: prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
